skills.freshness: Upstream is actively maintained and tracks Guild Wars Reforged balance updates (stat changes and newly added skills). Data is only as fresh as the installed package version; run the update workflow or `pnpm update @buildwars/gw-skilldata` to refresh. Recent balance notes: https://wiki.guildwars.com/wiki/Game_updates

heroes.source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gwdevhub/GWToolboxpp/master/Dependencies/GWCA/include/GWCA/Constants/Constants.h (GWCA HeroID enum, vendored in GWToolboxpp — the living source; standalone gwdevhub/GWCA is gone)
heroes.curatedOverlay: data/heroes-meta.json (professionId/campaignId/unlock — human knowledge, no machine-readable source exists)
